channel.title: Golang on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog
channel.description: Recent content in Golang on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog

item.title: Go (golang) plugin in Citellus
item.description: I wanted to practice a bit Go programing, so I divided that task in two parts, one, adding a golang extension for Citellus and a sample, but working plugin using it. If interested in the code it’s available at the review at https://review.gerrithub.io/c/citellusorg/citellus/+/495622. The final sample code for it has been: // Author: Pablo Iranzo Gómez (Pablo.Iranzo@gmail.com) // Header for citellus metadata // long_name: Report detected number of CPU's // description: List the processors detected in the system // priority: 200 package main import ( "bufio" "io" "os" "runtime" "strconv" "strings" ) func main() { var OKAY, _ = strconv.
